sequence.speaker: Brad
text: Welcome to the town, newbie. The name's Brad.

sequence.speaker: Abel
text: Abel. Where's the rest of the town?

sequence.speaker: Brad
text: Other side of the bridge. Although even on the other side, the town's as small as it gets. Right now you're looking at the closest thing we have to a public forum right here.

sequence.speaker: Brad
text: Hey, consider yourself luckly for the short commute. And... the short hop to yours truly when you need something to do after work.

sequence.speaker: Brad
text: Townsfolk come around for events. There's a general store just off the island but you probably won't need it as we have a deal with food delivery and you'll be getting fresh meals delivered.

sequence.speaker: Brad
text: Also, not to toot my own horn but I've got a great fried trout recipe too you may want to consider.

sequence.speaker: Abel
text: Nice, appreciate the hard sell. Tell you what, if I catch the fish for you can I get it cooked up for free?

sequence.speaker: Brad
text: But yes, historically, this bar has been and will always remain here. You'll see others as they come in here.

sequence.speaker: Brad
text: Hey, Some would love such a focused life.

sequence.speaker: Brad
text: Anyway, I'm always here. You'll be seeing me around.

has_met.speaker: Brad
text: I'm always here. You'll be seeing me around.
